description_long: An elderly man stands barefoot, dressed in a long, brown, hooded robe that reaches his ankles. His head is bald on top with a thin band of hair around the sides and back, and he has a long, pointed gray beard. His facial features are marked by pronounced wrinkles and a prominent nose, giving him a wise and aged appearance. The robe appears to be made of a coarse, matte fabric, with subtle texturing that suggests a natural fiber. His hands and feet are exposed, showing aged skin and thin fingers. The overall figure is slender, with a slightly stooped posture, and the clothing is loose-fitting and unadorned.
description: A barefoot elderly man with a bald head, long gray beard, and wrinkled face, wearing a long, brown, hooded robe. His posture is slightly stooped and his robe is loose and textured.
description_view_0: Front view showing the man's wrinkled face, long gray beard, bald head, and the full length of his brown robe.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of his face, the length of his beard, and the drape of the robe.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of his bald head, the hood of the robe, and the robe's full length and width.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of his face, beard, and the robe's side seam and drape.
attribute_clothing_style: Long, loose, brown hooded robe made of coarse, matte fabric; no visible patterns or accessories; barefoot.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with a slight stoop.
attribute_hairstyle: Bald on top with a thin band of short gray hair around the sides and back; long pointed gray beard.
attribute_facial_features: Pronounced wrinkles, long pointed gray beard, prominent nose, no glasses, aged and wise expression.
